onboarding.sous_titre: Rahoton Kula da Dukiya da Addini — Mazhabar {}
onboarding.prieres_manquees:
⚠️ LURA DA SALLAH: Lokacin sallah ya wuce wadannan salloli: {}.
👉 Da fatan za a cika wajibanku cikin gaggawa domin tsarkake lissafinku.
onboarding.prieres_ok: ✨ Madalla: Dukkan salloli na farilla sun kammala akan lokaci.
onboarding.joumouah: 🌟 RANAR JUMA'A: Tunatarwa kan karanta Suratul Kahf da yawaita salati ga Annabi (ﷺ).
onboarding.jours_blancs: ⚪ TUNATARWAR AZUMI: Muna cikin kwanakin farare (13, 14, 15 ga watan hilsi).
onboarding.entete_devotion: 📿 LISSASFIN LURA DA KAI NA KULLUM:
onboarding.nawafil_ok: • ✅ An kammala sallolin nafila. Allah ya kara kaimi da karfin gwiwa.
onboarding.nawafil_ko:
• 🔴 TUNATARWA NAFILA: Ba ka yi rajistar sallolin nafila ba a yau.
     👉 Kula da danyen nafila domin cike kura-kuran salloli na farilla.
onboarding.sadaqah_ok: • ✅ An yi sadaka ta sirri a yau. Tsaftar al'umma tana aiki.
onboarding.sadaqah_ko:
• 🔴 TUNATARWA SADAKA: Ba a shigar da sadaka ta radin kai ba a yau.
     👉 'Sadaka tana kashe zunubai kamar yadda ruwa ke kashe wuta'. Yi kokari ko kadan ne.
onboarding.hadj_ok: 🕋 AN KAMMALA AIKIN HAJJI: Barka da samun nasarar sauke farali! Yi tunani kan tallafawa iyaye ko na kusa domin aikin Hajji.
onboarding.hadj_ko: 🕋 CANCHANTAR HAJJI: Tanadinka ({:.0f} {}) ya cika sharrin iko na dukiya (Al-Istita'ah) domin aikin Hajji.
onboarding.tabaski: 🐑 LAYYA: Yin layyar idil adha babbar sunnah ce ga iyalanka dangane da tsaftar dukiyarka.
onboarding.anniversaire_alerte:
⚠️ TUNATARWA TA SHARIA MAI MUHIMMANCI: Yau ce ranar haihuwarka.
   👉 Hukuncin Sharia: Yin biki ko taya murna ranar haihuwa bidi'a ce da ba ta da tushe a ijma'in mazhabobi hudu. Yi amfani da wannan rana wajen tunani kan rayuwar da ke wucewa maimakon bidi'a.
onboarding.age_islamique: 🎂 SHEKARU NA SHARIA: Dangane da kalandar Musulunci ta wata, shekarunka na gaskiya su ne: {:.1f} shekaru.
onboarding.fin_muharram:
📌 KALANDAR WATANNI: Muna daf da karshen watan Muharram mai alfarma.
👉 Shawara: Yawaita addu'o'i da neman gafara sannan a shirya shiga watan Safar.
onboarding.general_devotion:
📖 TUNATARWAR KULLUM TA MUSULMI:
   • Alkur'ani: Ware lokaci a yau domin karantawa da tunani akan wasu ayoyi ko kadan ne.
   • Adhkar: Kula da addu'o'in safe da na maraice domin kariya.
   • Halayya: Kare harshenka, yi wa iyaye biyayya, kuma ka sadu da zumunta.

encyclopedie.titre: 📖 Wurin Binciken Shari'a da Tabbatarwa na Hayaati
encyclopedie.consigne: Zaɓi rukunin shari'a don nuna hujjojinsa ingantattu (Alkur'ani, Hadisi, Fikh) :

categories.texte:
✨ ALKUR'ANI (Suratu An-Nissa, v.11) :
Dole ne a biya bashi kafin a raba gado ko wasiyya: '...bayan cire wasiyya da aka yi ko bashi da ke kansa.'

✨ HADISI INBANTATTI (Al-Boukhari n°2289) :
An kawo gawa gaban Annabi ﷺ. Ya ce: 'Shin ya bar bashi?' Suka ce: 'Eles, dinari uku'. Ya ce: 'Ku yi wa abokin ku sallah (ni ba zan yi masa ba)'. Har sai da wani sahabi ya dauki nauyin biyan bashin.

✨ FIKH NA MAZHABOBI :
• Bashin da ke kanka: Abu na farko da za a cire a dukiyar gado. A mazhabar Maliki da Hanbali, yana rage yawan zakka.
• Bashin da kake bi: Idan mai bashi yana da ikon biya, mazhabar Hanafi ta ce za a fitar da zakka duk shekara. Mazhabar Maliki ta ce sau daya za a fitar idan kudi ya dawo hannu.

✨ ALKUR'ANI (Suratu At-Tawbah, v.34 & Suratul An'am, v.141) :
• Kudade: 'Wadanda ke taskance zinare da azurfa... yi musu albishir da azaba mai radadi.'
• Noma: 'Ku bada hakkinsu a ranar girbi.'

✨ HADISI INBANTATTI (Muslim n°981 / Al-Boukhari n°1454) :
• Kudade: Nisabi ya kai dinari 20 na zinare ko dirhami 200 na azurfa (kashi 2.5%).
• Noma: Nisabi shine kilogiram 653 (Wasaq 5). Kashi 10% idan na ruwan sama ne, kashi 5% idan na inji ne.
• Dabbobi: Tumaki/Awaki 40 (tunkiya 1). Shanu 30 (bila guda 1 mai shekara 1).

✨ FIKH NA MAZHABOBI :
Hadin kan malamai akan dabbobi da noma. Game da kayan adon mata na zinare, mazhabar Hanafi ta ce akwai zakka, amma mazhabobin Maliki, Shafi'i da Hanbali sun ce babu zakka idan na ado ne na halal.

✨ ALKUR'ANI (Suratu An-Nissa, v.11) :
'Namiji yana da rabon mace biyu (wajen gado).'

✨ HADISI INBANTATTI (Al-Boukhari n°6732 / Muslim n°1615) :
Annabi ﷺ ya ce: 'Ku bada rabon gado ga wadanda Allah ya ayyana musu. Abin da ya rage kuma a bawa namiji mafi kusa da mamacin.'

✨ FIKH NA MAZHABOBI :
Hadin kan mazhabobi hudu akan tsarin namiji rabo biyu ga mace daya. Wannan yana faruwa ne saboda nauyin ciyarwa (Nafaqah) da ke kan namiji kadai. Mace tana da ikon mallakar dukiyarta na gado ba tare da wani nauyin kashe kudi akan kowa ba.

✨ ALKUR'ANI (Suratul Baqarah, v.180 & Suratu An-Nissa, v.12/176) :
• Wasiyya: 'An faranta muku, idan mutuwa ta halarci dayanku... ya yi wasiyya.'
• Kalâlah: 'Idan namiji ko mace ta rasu ba ta bar uba ko waɗanda suka fito daga gare ta ba (Kalâlah)...'

✨ HADISI INBANTATTI (Al-Boukhari n°2744) :
• Wasiyya: Annabi ﷺ ya ce wa Sa'd: 'Ka bada kashi daya cikin uku (1/3). Kuma kashi daya cikin uku ma yana da yawa.' Babu wasiyya ga magaji.
• Kalâlah: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq ya ce Kalâlah shine wanda ya rasu babu mahaifi maza ko yara.

✨ FIKH NA MAZHABOBI :
Wasiyya ba za ta wuce kashi 1/3 na dukiya ba. Idan babu uba ko yara (Kalâlah), 'yan uwa ta wurin uwa suna raba kashi 1/3 daidai gwargwado tsakanin maza da mata, babu tsarin rabo biyu.

✨ ALKUR'ANI (Suratul Hashr, v.18) :
'Ya ku wadanda kuka yi imani! Ku ji tsoron Allah, kuma kowace rai ta duba abin da ta yi tanadi don gobe.'

✨ HADISI INBANTATTI (Al-Tirmidhi n°761 / Muslim n°728) :
• Kwanaki Masu Haske: Annabi ﷺ ya ce: 'Idan za ka yi azumi uku a wata, ka yi ranar 13, 14, da 15.'
• Nawafil: Annabi ﷺ ya ce: 'Wanda ya yi salla raka'ah sha biyu na sunnah kowace rana, Allah zai gina masa gida a Aljanna.'

✨ FIKH NA MAZHABOBI :
Hadin kan malamai akan muhimmancin salloli na sunnah (Rawatib) da azumin kwanaki masu haske domin tsarkake zuciya da kiyaye lokaci.
